workflow: deploy-staging.yml (workflow_dispatch, ref=main) — the normal protected staging path; no manual patching
rebuild_targets: default: mira-pipeline mira-mcp mira-hub mira-web mira-bot-telegram (bot image COPYs printsense/ per mira-bots/telegram/Dockerfile)
external_probe_from_dev_laptop: hub :4101 answers (308 redirect on /api/version — route exists); pipeline :4099 filtered from this network (fail2ban/ufw allowlist) — on-VPS checks above are the authoritative health evidence
migrations: none in this deploy (docs + printsense package only; no mira-hub/db/migrations changes in the ladder)

feature_flags_printsense.PRINT_VISION_EFFORT: unset -> code default xhigh (the production-default configuration, unchanged)

staging_bot: @Mira_stagong_bot (TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN_STG) — the phone-test surface for the deployed ladder; @FactoryLM_Diagnose is prod and redeploys on the prod pipeline, not this run
